summary: Iteration 10 testing completed - All 18 backend tests pass, web-client Home and Dashboard pages correctly display barbershop info (name, phone, address) from /api/barbershop/public-info API. All barbershop CRUD endpoints work as expected.

issues: Logo not displayed (logo_url is null in DB - expected behavior until logo is uploaded)

critical_code_review_comments: All barbershop endpoints properly implement CRUD operations
GET /api/barbershop/public-info correctly returns data without auth (for web-client)
POST /api/barbershop/ correctly blocks duplicate creation with 'ja possui' message
PUT /api/auth/update-phone accepts both phone AND birth_date fields
Birthday endpoint filters clients by current month using SQL EXTRACT function

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Home and Dashboard show barbershop info correctly

seed_data_creation: Barbershop already existed with id=1, name='Barbearia do Silvio', phone='(11) 99999-8888', address='Rua das Flores, 123'
context_for_next_testing_agent: All barbershop features fully tested and working. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration10_barbershop.py cover: health check, barbershop CRUD (public-info, mine, create, update), birthday clients, clients list, auth update-phone with birth_date. Web-client at http://localhost:80 properly shows barbershop info on Home (hero section) and Dashboard (header). Logo_url is null - upload functionality via POST /api/barbershop/logo exists but not tested with actual file upload.

tested_features.GET /api/barbershop/public-info: PASS - Returns name, phone, address, logo_url without auth
tested_features.GET /api/barbershop/mine (auth): PASS - Returns full barbershop data with owner_id
tested_features.GET /api/clients/birthdays (auth): PASS - Returns list with name, phone, birth_date, birth_day
tested_features.GET /api/clients/ (auth): PASS - Returns clients with all fields including source
tested_features.Web Home page: PASS - Shows 'Barbearia do Silvio', '(11) 99999-8888', 'Rua das Flores, 123'
tested_features.Web Dashboard page: PASS - Shows barbershop name, phone, address in header

mocked_apis_note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints are real
